name: Commercial State Bank
description_short: Commercial State Bank is a community bank offering checking, savings, and loan products with 24-hour digital banking access via phone and online platforms.
description_long:
Commercial State Bank operates as a traditional community bank serving customers through both physical locations and digital channels. The bank is based in Palmer, Texas, and maintains an established presence in its local market with multiple branch locations and hours of operation available on their website.

The bank offers core banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), debit cards, loans, and online banking services. Account holders can access their finances through multiple channels: traditional in-person banking at branch locations, 24-hour telephone banking via TeleBank, and online banking through their TeleWeb platform accessible on computers, smartphones, and tablets. The bank also provides online bill pay, fund transfers between accounts, and ACH transaction management.

Commercial State Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on 24-hour access and multi-channel banking convenience. The bank offers email and text alerts for account monitoring, allows customers to link multiple accounts to a single debit card, and provides downloadable account information compatible with Quicken and Microsoft Money. Their commitment to local community engagement is evident through their website's inclusion of local community links and resources.

The bank appears to be a standard community financial institution without specialized lending products or premium wealth management services visible on their public website. Their online presence is functional but basic, focusing on practical banking access rather than comprehensive digital innovation. For consumers seeking traditional banking with local branch access and straightforward products, Commercial State Bank serves as a viable option, though it lacks the fintech features or extensive product portfolios of larger regional or national banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Account data downloads to Quicken/Microsoft Money
pros: 24-hour telephone banking (TeleBank) accessible via (972) 449-2399 for account management without branch hours restrictions
Multiple digital access channels including online banking (TeleWeb) compatible with computers, smartphones, and tablets
Email and text alert notifications for account monitoring and activity tracking
Ability to link multiple accounts to a single debit card for consolidated access
Online bill pay and ACH transaction management through TeleWeb platform
Account data downloads compatible with Quicken and Microsoft Money for personal finance software integration
Local community bank with multiple physical branch locations for in-person service
cons: Limited information about loan products, terms, rates, or lending criteria available on public website
Basic website design and navigation lack modern fintech features or comprehensive online experience
No visible mention of mobile app—banking only available through generic TeleWeb platform
No information about account fees, minimum balances, interest rates, or CD terms publicly disclosed

contact.address: 8045 N Interstate 45 Service Rd, Palmer, TX 75152

best_for: Local Palmer, Texas residents seeking traditional banking with physical branch access
Customers who prefer telephone and online banking over mobile-first digital platforms
Consumers wanting 24-hour account access without visiting a branch location
diagnosis: Commercial State Bank is best for local Palmer, Texas residents and customers who value traditional community banking with 24-hour access via phone and online channels. The main caveat is that the bank's public website provides minimal transparency about loan products, fees, rates, and account terms, requiring direct contact with the bank for detailed product information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 8045 N Interstate 45 Service Rd, Palmer, TX 75152
